title: Undertake chiller assessment to AUS-MEAT requirements
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake chiller assessment to AUS-MEAT requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct AUS-MEAT Chiller Assessment

pcs.text: Monitor product daily to ensure compliance with AUS-MEAT Chiller Assessment pre-conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor product daily to ensure compliance with AUS-MEAT Chiller Assessment pre-conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor product daily to ensure compliance with AUS-MEAT Chiller Assessment pre-conditions.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply slaughter floor ticket information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply slaughter floor ticket information.

pcs.text: Assess beef carcases for marbling, meat and fat colour scores according to the AUS-MEAT Chiller Assessment Standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess beef carcases for marbling, meat and fat colour scores according to the AUS-MEAT Chiller Assessment Standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess beef carcases for marbling, meat and fat colour scores according to the AUS-MEAT Chiller Assessment Standards.

pcs.text: Assess beef carcases for eye muscle area, subcutaneous and total rib fat and carcase maturity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess beef carcases for eye muscle area, subcutaneous and total rib fat and carcase maturity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess beef carcases for eye muscle area, subcutaneous and total rib fat and carcase maturity.

pcs.text: Correctly allocate the Grain Fed (GF) and Grain Fed Young Beef (GFYG) symbols to beef carcases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Correctly allocate the Grain Fed (GF) and Grain Fed Young Beef (GFYG) symbols to beef carcases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Correctly allocate the Grain Fed (GF) and Grain Fed Young Beef (GFYG) symbols to beef carcases.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage chiller assessment equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage chiller assessment equipment.
